## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members Nathalie and Ifeoluwa to GrowthX, introducing Day 1 and Week 1 tasks and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires to focus on company-wide onboarding tasks in Notion and Linear, including account setup and resource review](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Time-off policy is unlimited PTO with no approval required; just block calendar time and notify team](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Daily updates via Geekbot and 4-hour overlap with Pacific time expected for remote workers](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - <Team@growthxlab.com> email setup completed during the call for accessing tools and scheduling client meetings

## Topics

### Introductions

  - [Alice Ochieng: Executive Assistant at GrowthX since July 2022, based in Nairobi but working Pacific hours (7:30 AM - 4:30 PM PT)](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Nathalie Schrans: New hire based in Los Angeles, 6+ years in content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Ifeoluwa (Ife) Adekoya: New hire based in Lagos, Nigeria, 5 years experience in content marketing and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### Onboarding Resources and Tasks

  - [Notion: Primary knowledge management platform](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [Handbook \> Onboarding \> Onboarding Resources](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Company-wide onboarding section covers Day 1 and Week 1 tasks](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Linear: Project management tool with duplicated onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [My Projects \> Onboarding project \> Issues](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [Tasks marked for Day 1 and Week 1 completion](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### Company Policies and Programs

  - [Time-off policy: Unlimited PTO, no approval needed; block calendar time and notify team](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Employee Referral Program: Up to $10K USD for engineering roles, $5K for non-engineering (after 6-month retention)](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Code of Conduct and other company resources available in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Tools and Communication

  - [Geekbot: Used for daily updates on priorities, roadblocks, and concerns](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [IT and Tools Slack channel: For access requests and issues (cc Alice or Yusuf)](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meetings: New hires to introduce themselves at next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - <Team@growthxlab.com> email: Set up during the call for tool access and client meeting scheduling

## Next Steps

  - [Complete Day 1 tasks in Linear, including account setups](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Review Week 1 resources and attend scheduled meetings](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Set up Geekbot for daily updates](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Nathalie: Add Bridget and Andy to calendar for upcoming September time-off](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Ife: Check Slack channel access and notify Alice of any missing permissions](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Both: Prepare brief introduction for next week's all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Reach out to Alice for any access issues or questions](https://fathom.video/share/szxbsK55fRxgvxaqSCiVsExqyQ646YiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
